member.name: M:Presentation.Controller.LocationController.AddLocation(Shared.DTOs.LocationModule.AddLocationDTO)
member.summary: Creates a new Location in the system.

member.name: M:Presentation.Controller.LocationController.UpdateLocation(System.Int32,Shared.DTOs.LocationModule.UpdateLocationDTO)
member.remarks: Allows administrators to modify location details.

member.name: M:Presentation.Controller.LocationController.DeleteLocation(System.Int32)
member.remarks: Performs a soft delete by setting IsActive = false.
